title: JOYMOOP Mop and Bucket with Wringer Set for Home, Flat Mop and Bucket System, Mops for Floor Cleaning and Wall Cleaner, with 3 Reusable Microfiber Mop Pads
features: [Household Cleaning Tool] JOYMOOP mop and bucket with wringer set, 2 chambers of mop bucket, wash and dry, scratch dirt away in wash chamber, squeeze out of water in dry chamber, without hands cleaning. Note: Please wet mop to avoid hard insert problems

[Mop and Bucket] A self-cleaning mop reduces your time and labor, allowing the bucket to handle more than you can on your own. Mopping is simplified between the mop and bucket, keeping you away from dirty water; all you need to do is insert and pull the mop

[Mops for Floor Cleaning] With a 360-degree rotation mop head, it can reach the wall, any corners, and those under whatever places. The adjustable stainless-steel handle can be extended from 26.5 to 50.0 inches, allowing family members to participate in mopping with this clean home mop
[Easy Storage] All pieces are compact enough to fit effortlessly inside the bucket. When not in use, just put it in the corner and never worry about taking up too much space

[Reusable Microfiber Pad Refills] Applied to a 13.0 by 4.9-inch mop head. 3 microfiber mop pad refills come with this set. Strong water absorption lets you easily do any wet and dry cleaning. To keep long-term usability, recommend changing refills every 1-2 months based on usage frequency

specifications_table.Included components: ‎1 Mop-head with 1 Pad, 4 Mop Handle Rods, 1 Bucket, 1 Instruction Manual, 2 Extra Pads
specifications_table.Special feature: ‎360° Rotation, Self-Cleaning Mop, Stainless Steel Adjustable Handle
